B 83

RED OVEN PIZZA BAKERY

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: April 21, 2026

B · 83/100 · safer than 25% of Orange County restaurants we grade

Does RED OVEN PIZZA BAKERY keep a clean kitchen? Mostly — a B (83/100) at its latest inspection, April 21, 2026. That visit logged 2 high-priority and 1 basic violations.

Inspectors cited 2 high-priority and 1 basic violations. That puts it safer than 25% of Orange County restaurants we grade. Diner rating: 3.8 from 1,593 reviews. Menus here flag options for vegetarian diners.

Get directions Call (407) 224-3663
